# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to this resource collection.

## How to contribute

### Add a paper, dataset, or tool
1. Fork the repo
2. Add your entry to the appropriate `.md` file following the existing format
3. Open a pull request with a brief description

### Suggest a resource
Open an issue with the title `[Paper]`, `[Dataset]`, or `[Tool]` and include:
- Title and authors (or tool name)
- Link (DOI, PubMed, or GitHub)
- Brief note on why it's relevant

### Co-speakers and organizers
If you're a speaker or organizer for this session, you can:
- Add or edit content under `talks/your-talk/`
- Add references to shared paper lists
- Request write access by opening an issue

### Format conventions
- Papers: `Author et al. (Year) — Brief description. [Journal](link) *(open access if applicable)*`
- Datasets: Use the table format in `datasets/README.md`
- Tools: Use the table format in `tools/README.md`
- Mark open-access resources with *(open access)* so readers know what's freely available

## Code of conduct
Be respectful and constructive. This is a community resource for advancing MSK MRI research.
